person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Margaret of Blois (French: Marguerite; died 1230) was suo jure Countess of Blois from 1218 to 1230, in what is now France. «b»Life«/b» She was daughter of Theobald V of Blois and Alix of France. Margaret married three times. Her first marriage was to Hugh of Oisy, Lord of Montmirail. Her second husband was Otto I, Count of Burgundy, with whom she had two daughters: 1.) Joanna I, Countess of Burgundy 2.) Beatrice II, Countess of Burgundy Finally, she married Walter II of Avesnes, they had: 1.) Theobald, died young 2.) Mary, Countess of Blois

Marguerite de Blois, née en 1170, elle est la fille de Thibaut V de Blois et d'Alix de France. Elle a quatre frères et deux sœurs : Adélaïde et Isabelle. Elle devient comtesse de Blois et de Châteaudun après le décès en 1218 de son neveu Thibaut VI de Blois, en tant que sœur aînée, ses frères étant prédécédés et sans descendance. 

Mariages et enfants 

Elle est mariée en premières noces vers 1183 à Hugues III d'Oisy, vicomte de Cambrai († 1190). 
À sa mort en 1190 elle épouse Othon Ier comte de Bourgogne († 1200), ils ont deux enfants : 
- Jeanne ; 
- Béatrice. 

Elle épouse plus tard en troisièmes noces Gautier II d'Avesnes, seigneur d'Avesnes de Leuze, de Condé et de Guise († v.1246). Ils ont trois enfants : 
- Thibaut, mort jeune ; 
- Marie d'Avesnes (v. 1200, † 1241), mariée à Hugues Ier de Châtillon, comte de Saint-Pol (1196 † 1248) ; 
- Isabelle, mariée à Jean, seigneur d'Oisy et de Montreuil. Mort À sa mort en 1230, le comté de Blois est donné à sa fille, Marie.

Margaret of Blois (French: Marguerite; died 1230) was suo jure Countess of Blois from 1218 to 1230, in what is now France.

_____

Comtesse De Blois Et Châteaudun En 1218 Après Son Neveu

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Blois于1170年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，她的父亲Thibaut V de Blois40岁，母亲Alix de France19岁。她于1190年与Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1230年7月12日在她的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Blois was born in 1170, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Thibaut V de Blois, was 40 and her mother, Alix de France, was 19. She married Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund in 1190. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 12 July 1230, in her hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Blois est née en 1170, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Thibaut V de Blois, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Alix de France, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund en 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 juillet 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Blois 1170 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thibaut V de Blois 40 und ihre Mutter Alix de France 19. Sie hat 1190 Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Juli 1230 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Blois è nata il nel 1170 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Thibaut V de Blois, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Alix de France, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund nel 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 12 luglio 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bloisが1170年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Thibaut V de Bloisは40歳，母Alix de Franceは19歳であった。1190年にOtto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgundと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1230年7月12日に故郷で60歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeドウブズベサンcオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Blois(이)가 1170년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thibaut V de Blois(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de France(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1190년 Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1230년 7월 12일 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 다브스 베산c에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Blois nasceu em 1170, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Thibaut V de Blois, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Alix de France, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund em 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de julho de 1230, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Blois родилась в 1170 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Thibaut V de Blois было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de France, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund в 1190 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 июля 1230 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности бесанcон, доубс, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Blois nació en 1170, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Thibaut V de Blois, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Alix de France, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund en 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de julio de 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
